name: photon-exposure-ds
description: Photon Exposure Engine design system — web counterpart of the Android app's visual language

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:react --external:react-dom --external:react/jsx-runtime --jsx=automatic && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/photon.css dist/photon.css
